description: Residual post-evidence interpretation layer after practice contract, evidence, backfill, and curriculum rollout work are stable; add deterministic and AI-assisted teacher summaries without re-owning baseline teacher review
deviation_notes: Narrowed on 2026-03-19 so this track owns interpretation only; generic teacher evidence, submission persistence, and component migration work now belong to the earlier practice_* tracks. Dependency on Curriculum Rollout (Track 4) relaxed on 2026-03-19: error analysis operates on stored submissions, not authored lesson files. May run in parallel with Track 4. Phase 1 complete: implemented error analysis module with deterministic summary assembly, AI-assisted interpretation with graceful fallback, and teacher access authorization.
